name: Is using AI for legal research the same as getting advice from a lawyer?
description: No privilege or relationship—AI isn't a lawyer.[1]

mainEntity.name: Is using AI for legal research the same as getting advice from a lawyer?

acceptedAnswer.text: No privilege or relationship—AI isn't a lawyer.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, AI isn't a lawyer, forms no privilege, and its 'advice' can be evidence against you.[1][5] Courts ruled AI disclaims legal roles.[1] Key factors: Research okay if verified; advice-giving unauthorized for non-lawyers; access-to-justice tools emerging but limited.[2][5] Use AI as a starting point only, then consult an attorney. Never rely solely on it.
